hero.title:
Korea's Job Platform
for Foreign Talent
hero.subtitle: AI-powered personalized job matching to help you land your dream job in Korea

services.title: Work In Korea
services.subtitle: We provide special services for your successful employment in Korea
services.service1Desc: AI-powered personalized job analysis recommends the best companies for you. Find the perfect opportunity that matches your skills and experience.
services.service2Desc: Create a perfect application with expert-verified resume templates optimized for Korean companies.
services.service3Desc: Improve your interview success rate with mock interviews and personalized feedback from industry professionals.

diagnosis.title: AI Self-Assessment
diagnosis.subtitle: Find the right job type and company for you
diagnosis.question: Question {current} of {total}

session1.title: Basic Info 🌍
session1.subtitle: Tell us about yourself
session1.q1Label: Q1. Where are you located right now?
session1.q2Label: Q2. How well do you speak Korean? 🗣️
session1.q3Label: Q3. Do you have a visa to work in Korea? 📋

koreanLevels.native: I speak it as freely as a native
koreanLevels.topik6: Business conversations are no problem (TOPIK Level 6)
koreanLevels.topik45: I can handle everyday conversations (TOPIK Level 4-5)
koreanLevels.topik23: I can manage basic conversations (TOPIK Level 2-3)

visaStatus.have: Yes, I already have a work visa
visaStatus.need: No, I need the company to sponsor my visa
visaStatus.permanent: No visa worries (Permanent residency, F-visa, etc.)

session2.title: Career & Skills 💼
session2.subtitle: Tell us about your experience
session2.q4Label: Q4. How much work experience do you have?
session2.q5Label: Q5. What are you best at? ⭐
session2.q6Label: Q6. What is your highest level of education? 🎓
session2.q7Label: Q7. What languages can you use? 🗣️

strengths.inKorea: You're already in Korea and can start working immediately

improvements.visa: You need to find a company that can sponsor your work visa
improvements.keepGoing: Keep your current progress and prepare consistently
